---
title: "Segmentation Analysis"
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

df = pd.DataFrame({
    "Cluster": ["0","1","2","3","4"],
    "Revenue": [1.2e6, 1.2e6, 9.3e6, 2.5e6, 1.6e6],
    "Customers": [960, 940, 2320, 35, 2],
    "RPC": [1250, 1275, 4000, 71428, 800000]
})

px.bar(df, x="Cluster", y="Revenue", text=df["Revenue"].map(lambda x: f"${x/1e6:.1f}M"),
       title="Revenue Distribution Across Clusters")


px.bar(df, x="Cluster", y="Customers", text="Customers",
       title="Customer Count by Cluster")

px.bar(df, x="Cluster", y="RPC",
       title="Revenue per Customer (Log Scale)").update_yaxes(type="log")
